race.comment: TOROKAWA (11) is one of a few first-starters who has been trialling up nicely, particularly at the latest when she showed good early speed and was strong to the line when winning. ZOUSOUTH (7) is struggling to break through but has been around the mark in two of three runs this time in and draws to again play a prominent role. MAYA'S ACE (12) has been given time after a two-run debut prep and recent jumpouts, including a win at Flemington two back, suggest she's come on. LOGAM (4) is a Prague gelding on debut for the Alderson camp. Has come along nicely at the jumpouts and can make a bright start. Worth monitoring market moves.
